summary_zh: 设计可编程核酸结构与功能组装体，探索其在响应、递送和生物调控中的应用。
summary_en: Designing programmable nucleic acid structures and functional assemblies for responsive systems, delivery, and biological regulation.
detail_zh: 围绕核酸分子识别、动态组装和多尺度材料构筑，发展兼具结构精确性与生物适配性的功能材料体系。
detail_en: We develop functional material systems that combine structural precision with biological compatibility through molecular recognition, dynamic assembly, and multiscale engineering.
keywords_zh: DNA/RNA 组装|可编程材料|刺激响应|递送体系

summary_zh: 发展面向疾病微环境的核酸探针、纳米载体和诊疗一体化策略。
summary_en: Developing nucleic acid probes, nanocarriers, and integrated theranostic strategies for disease microenvironments.
detail_zh: 结合分子探针、信号放大和智能响应机制，构建用于疾病标志物检测、成像和治疗协同的功能体系。
detail_en: By integrating molecular probes, signal amplification, and smart response mechanisms, we build systems for biomarker detection, imaging, and therapeutic synergy.
keywords_zh: 分子探针|生物成像|诊疗一体化|疾病微环境

summary_zh: 构建材料-细胞界面调控策略，理解功能材料与复杂生物体系的相互作用。
summary_en: Building material-cell interface strategies to understand interactions between functional materials and complex biological systems.
detail_zh: 面向细胞识别、免疫调控和组织微环境，研究核酸功能材料在生物界面上的行为、响应与调控规律。
detail_en: We study the behavior, response, and regulation of nucleic acid functional materials at biointerfaces related to cell recognition, immune modulation, and tissue microenvironments.
keywords_zh: 生物界面|细胞识别|免疫调控|材料-生物相互作用
